## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[22:10]` **AbelZeta 宣布在《自然》杂志上发表文章，重点介绍装甲自体 GPC3 CAR-T 疗法治疗晚期肝细胞癌的临床结果**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *AbelZeta announces publication in Nature journal highlighting clinical findings for an armored autologous GPC3 CAR-T therapy in patients with advanced hepatocellular carcinoma* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
